rationale: The response produces a doc artifact but omits the mandatory specification structure (no acceptance criteria, no invariants, no test conditions, no goals/non-goals) and cites Mathlib paths (`Mathlib.Order.WellFounded`) without any verifiable anchor. Audience-appropriateness is not in the rubric, but the structural omissions cleanly match the Score 2 definition.
rubric_evidence: Required vocabulary: dependent types, propositional equality, well-founded recursion, type-class resolution, structural induction, `Decidable` instances.
Doc comments should cite the relevant `Mathlib.Order.WellFounded` lemmas and Coquand's type theory as the foundational reference.
